footer.tagline: Thoughtful journeys through Cabo Verde, shaped with local warmth and quiet refinement.

hero.title: Travel Cabo Verde with local warmth, elegant guidance, and confidence from the start
hero.description: Tuba Travel is designed for travelers who want more than information alone. We bring together trusted local insight, memorable experiences, and a calm premium feel so your journey begins with clarity and peace of mind.
highlights: Local insight with a premium touch
Clear planning from inspiration to inquiry

destinations.title: Choose the island that matches the journey you want
destinations.description: From beach calm to cultural richness and dramatic scenery, Tuba Travel helps travelers discover the island that feels right for their time, style, and pace.

items.title: Sal
items.description: Perfect for relaxed beach stays, sunshine, sea views, and an easy island atmosphere that invites you to slow down.

items.title: Santiago
items.description: Ideal for travelers who want culture, history, music, and a deeper connection to everyday Cabo Verdean life.

items.title: Santo Antao
items.description: Made for travelers drawn to mountain landscapes, fresh air, and unforgettable outdoor discovery.

experiences.title: Choose experiences that make your trip feel effortless and memorable
experiences.description: Our experiences are designed to help you enjoy Cabo Verde with more ease, more depth, and more of the moments you will remember long after the journey ends.

items.title: Ocean outings
items.description: Boat days and coastal moments designed for travelers who want sea air, open views, and a sense of quiet escape.

items.title: Cultural encounters
items.description: Local stories, music, food, and neighborhood experiences that bring you closer to the spirit of the islands.

items.title: Scenic adventures
items.description: Walking routes and open-air discoveries for travelers who want movement, perspective, and natural beauty.

whyChooseUs.title: A travel brand built to feel reassuring, refined, and genuinely local
whyChooseUs.description: Tuba Travel is designed to make planning feel easier, more personal, and more reassuring from the very first step.

items.title: A clear multilingual experience
items.description: Travelers can browse comfortably in English, French, or Portuguese without losing consistency or ease.

items.title: A structure built for real travel decisions
items.description: Destinations, services, and inquiries are organized to support how people actually choose and plan island journeys.

items.title: A strong foundation for growth
items.description: The platform is ready to evolve into richer guides, service flows, and booking-ready experiences over time.

cta.title: Ready to take the next step toward Cabo Verde?
cta.description: Let Tuba Travel turn your first ideas into a clear, welcoming, and well-guided travel plan.

intro.title: Find the island experience that feels right for you
intro.description: Each island offers a different mood, pace, and perspective. Tuba Travel helps you compare them more clearly so you can choose with confidence.

cards.title: Santiago
cards.description: A strong choice for travelers who want history, music, local flavor, and a richer understanding of Cabo Verdean culture.

cards.title: Sal
cards.description: A bright and easy coastal destination for beach lovers, laid-back stays, and comfortable island time.

cards.title: São Vicente
cards.description: A vibrant island known for character, creativity, seafront charm, and a more expressive urban energy.

intro.title: Choose the support and experiences that fit your trip best
intro.description: Whether you need island discovery, cultural depth, smooth logistics, or tailored planning, Tuba Travel helps shape your trip with thoughtful local support.

cards.title: Island Tours
cards.description: Guided island experiences that help you see the highlights, understand the atmosphere, and make the most of your time.

cards.title: Cultural Experiences
cards.description: Thoughtfully chosen moments that bring you closer to local music, food, heritage, and everyday island life.

cards.title: Airport Transfers
cards.description: Reliable transfer support for smoother arrivals, calmer departures, and less travel stress.

cards.title: Personalized Travel Planning
cards.description: Tailored support for travelers who want a more seamless itinerary and a trip shaped around their priorities.

hero.title: A travel brand created to present Cabo Verde with warmth, trust, and quiet sophistication
hero.description: Tuba Travel is being built as a multilingual tourism platform that helps visitors discover Cabo Verde through clear guidance, local perspective, and a more personal sense of care from the very beginning.
highlights: Premium in feel, warm in tone

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.description: Tuba Travel is an emerging tourism brand focused on making Cabo Verde easier to understand, easier to explore, and more beautifully presented online. We believe planning a trip should feel reassuring as well as inspiring.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: Our vision is to create a more refined and welcoming gateway to Cabo Verde, where travelers can move from curiosity to confidence through trusted information, thoughtful experiences, and human support.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.description: We combine clarity, local sensitivity, and elegant simplicity. That means multilingual content, clean structure, and carefully chosen touchpoints that help travelers feel guided rather than overwhelmed.

whyTravelWithUs.title: Why travel with Tuba Travel
whyTravelWithUs.description: Because the journey begins long before arrival. Tuba Travel is being shaped to make that beginning feel smoother, more trustworthy, and more connected to the spirit of Cabo Verde itself.

hero.title: Tell us what kind of Cabo Verde journey you have in mind
hero.description: Whether you already know the island you want or you are still exploring possibilities, we are here to help shape the next step with clarity, warmth, and local understanding.
hero.trustMessage: Every inquiry is handled with care, clarity, and real attention to the details that matter to your trip.

whatsapp.title: Prefer to speak on WhatsApp?
whatsapp.description: For quicker questions, early ideas, or a more direct conversation, WhatsApp is often the easiest way to begin.

email.title: Would you rather write by email?
email.description: Share your travel ideas, preferred destination, or service needs and we will continue the conversation with care.

form.title: Start planning your trip with us
form.description: Share a few details about your trip so we can reply with guidance that feels relevant, well prepared, and easy to move forward with.
form.successDescription: Thank you for contacting Tuba Travel. We have received your details and will follow up as soon as possible.
form.errorMessage: We could not send your inquiry right now. Please try again in a moment or contact us by WhatsApp or email.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidWhatsappNumber: Please enter a valid WhatsApp number.
